name: Crockpot Boston Baked Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the navy beans in water overnight.
2. Drain the beans and place them in the cooker.
3. Add chopped onions, brown sugar, molasses, catsup, diced bacon, salt, dry mustard, and pepper to the cooker.
4. Pour in 1 cup of water and stir to combine all ingredients.
5. Cover and cook on low for 10 to 12 hours.
6. Optionally, add a few cloves of garlic, half a teaspoon of powdered ginger, and a good dash of Worcestershire sauce during cooking for added flavor.
7. As the last hour of cooking time approaches, stir in 1 cup of drained pineapple chunks for a delicious fruity flavor.
